name: Copernicus Sentinel-1 Mission Data Collection
provider: European Space Agency / Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem

doi_or_citation: Copernicus Sentinel-1 mission data collection
notes: Canonical mission-level entry; do not count individual Sentinel-1 granules as separate datasets.
desc_zh: Sentinel-1 是 Copernicus 计划的 C 波段合成孔径雷达任务，提供全天时、全天候的陆地、海洋、冰雪和灾害监测数据。该条记录作为任务级核心入口，覆盖 GRD、SLC、OCN 等产品以及 Copernicus Data Space 的检索和下载接口。适合后续派生 RTC、InSAR、洪水和海冰专题产品的谱系追踪。
desc_en: Sentinel-1 is the core Copernicus C-band SAR mission archive, providing all-weather day-and-night radar acquisitions for land, ocean, cryosphere, and emergency applications. This record is kept at the mission/product-family level rather than per granule. It is the canonical source for GRD, SLC, OCN, and related access through the Copernicus Data Space portal and APIs.
access_status: registration_required
openness: open public mission data; account required for bulk download/API use
source_type: mission archive
evidence: Copernicus Data Space Sentinel-1 collection page describes the C-SAR mission and access route.
scale: C-band SAR; product-dependent resolution

desc_zh: 该 AWS Open Data 条目把全球 Sentinel-1 GRD 归档转换为云优化 GeoTIFF，便于直接在云环境中读取和分析。它不是新的卫星任务，而是 Sentinel-1 GRD 的云原生访问集合，适合大规模雷达后向散射、灾害和海洋应用工作流。与 Copernicus 原始 SAFE 入口相比，该集合重点是 S3/COG 访问效率。
desc_en: This AWS Open Data collection exposes the global Sentinel-1 GRD archive as cloud-optimized GeoTIFFs. It is a cloud-native access and conversion layer for the Copernicus Sentinel-1 GRD products, not a separate observing mission. The dataset is useful for scalable backscatter analytics, hazard mapping, and marine monitoring workflows that benefit from S3 and COG access.

source_type: cloud collection
evidence: AWS Registry entry states Sentinel-1 GRD archive is converted to cloud-optimized GeoTIFF format.

The dataset is included as a multimodal benchmark with a central SAR component.

It provides calibrated radar backscatter useful for studying ice-sheet morphology, coastlines, rock outcrops, and upper-snow processes. desc_en: MEaSUREs InSAR-Based Antarctica Ice Velocity Map provides high-resolution digital mosaics of Antarctic ice motion. The product is assembled from multiple satellite interferometric SAR systems, with major inputs around the International Polar Years and later campaigns. It is an important open derived InSAR dataset for ice-sheet dynamics, mass-balance, and ice-flow change studies.

desc_en: This MEaSUREs dataset provides seasonal winter, ice-sheet-wide velocity maps for Greenland derived from InSAR data. It supports studies of ice-sheet-scale flow structure, major outlet systems, and long-term glacier dynamics. The record is kept separate from monthly and quarterly mosaics because the product scope and cadence differ.

The repository provides a 4.3 GiB complete ZIP and component ZIP downloads for wake-based ship classification research.

It is cataloged as a maritime SAR benchmark dataset.

desc_en: This ONERA / Recherche Data Gouv dataset supports weakly supervised mountain snow-cover segmentation from Sentinel-1 SAR imagery. It includes VV/VH backscatter over the Guil basin, MODIS-derived binary snow labels projected into SAR geometry, projection maps, normalization statistics, and train/validation/test splits including spatial and temporal transfer tests.

desc_en: This dataset provides Sentinel-1-derived ice velocity time series, speed-change products and calving-front positions for the Pope, Smith and Kohler basin in West Antarctica. Annual velocity mosaics are distributed as 100 m GeoTIFFs with spatially and temporally varying error estimates, while Crosson and Dotson Ice Shelf calving fronts are provided as shapefiles. It supports studies of ice-flow change, calving-front dynamics and Antarctic ice-sheet response.

The landing page describes an adapted SBAS workflow and products including freeze-thaw displacement, multiannual velocity, vertical/east-west decomposition and downslope-projected velocities. It supports permafrost degradation, rock-glacier movement and high-mountain sediment-transport studies.

desc_en: This dataset contains about 129,000 labeled C-band SAR backscatter time series for lake-ice regime classification in Old Crow Flats, Yukon. Samples use Sentinel-1A, ERS-1/2 and RADARSAT-1 imagery from 1992 to 2021, with labels for bedfast ice, floating ice and land. It also provides GeoTIFF and PNG lake-ice maps generated using a temporal deep-learning workflow.

It supports long-term glacier velocity and SAR archive reuse studies.

desc_en: This dataset uses 2015-2019 ascending and descending snow-free Sentinel-1 imagery and multi-temporal-baseline InSAR stacking to produce simplified ground-velocity products and slope-movement inventories for about 7500 km2 in Northern Norway. It supports studies of snow/ice thickness versus SAR backscatter, polar fjord ice conditions and multi-frequency SAR validation.

The landing page describes it as a sensor-era extension of the Sentinel-1 Hornsund product and includes documentation of scenes, polarization channels, segmentation and manual editing. It supports pre-Sentinel-1 fjord sea-ice time series, Arctic coastal ice monitoring and cross-sensor continuity studies.

The landing page describes it as an extension of the same fjord ice-distribution product family built from Sentinel-1 and RADARSAT-2, using the Envisat ASAR archive for classification maps. It supports long-term Arctic fjord sea-ice reconstruction, sensor-transition analysis and coastal ice studies over climate-relevant periods.

desc_zh: CaFFe 是面向冰川崩解前缘自动提取的 SAR 深度学习 benchmark。数据集包含 7 条海洋终止冰川的多传感器 SAR 图像，覆盖 Sentinel-1、TerraSAR-X、TanDEM-X、ENVISAT、ERS、ALOS PALSAR 和 RADARSAT-1，并配套前缘、地貌分区和动态前缘框标签。它适合 SAR 语义分割、冰川前缘检测和跨传感器泛化评估。
desc_en: CaFFe is a SAR deep-learning benchmark for automatic calving-front extraction from marine-terminating glaciers. It includes multi-sensor SAR imagery for seven glaciers, using Sentinel-1, TerraSAR-X, TanDEM-X, ENVISAT, ERS, ALOS PALSAR and RADARSAT-1, with calving-front labels, landscape-zone labels and dynamic-front bounding boxes. It supports SAR segmentation, glacier-front detection and cross-sensor generalization studies.

desc_en: This dataset provides ice-surface velocity products for selected Greenland and Antarctic regions using TerraSAR-X InSAR, Sentinel-1 InSAR and Sentinel-1/TerraSAR-X intensity offset tracking. The landing page describes a 30 m TerraSAR-X field near EGRIP, Sentinel-1 mosaics around NEGIS and velocity fields for the Filchner-Ronne Ice Shelf and Support Force Glacier. It supports polar ice dynamics, ice-shelf velocity validation and comparison of SAR-derived glacier products.

It supports studies of Arctic young-ice deformation, ice-tracking algorithms and SAR-based sea-ice dynamics.

desc_en: This Figshare collection packages flood proxy maps and a damage proxy map for Tokyo, Fukushima, Ibaraki and Nagano after Typhoon Hagibis. The collection states that the FPM/DPM products are derived from ESA Sentinel-1 and JAXA ALOS-2 SAR data and analyzed by ARIA-SG and NASA/JPL-Caltech ARIA; five component articles provide ZIP downloads for rapid SAR disaster mapping and change-detection studies.

Article APIs confirm CC0 ZIP files Nagano_FPM.zip, Tokyo_FPM.zip, Fukushima_FPM.zip, Ibaraki_FPM.zip and Tokyo_DPM.zip.

feature_count: 5 component Figshare dataset articles

theme_canonical: Sentinel-1 SAR-derived Antarctic sea ice velocity dataset
theme_raw: SAR-derived Antarctic sea ice velocity (2015-2023)
coverage: Antarctic sea ice zone / NSIDC EASE-Grid South
license: CC-BY-4.0
formats: NetCDF annual sea-ice velocity files
access: Zenodo DOI landing page / direct file download
doi_or_citation: DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18737893; SAR-derived Antarctic sea ice velocity 2015-2023
time_span: 2015-2023 annual Sentinel-1 SAR-derived sea ice velocity products
notes: Accepted in v132 after DOI, URL, title, Antarctic sea ice velocity alias and Zenodo record ID dedup against v131. Zenodo metadata lists annual NetCDF files and variables for Sentinel-1 SAR pair-derived u/v sea-ice velocity components and time differences.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集提供 2015-2023 年南极海冰速度的 Sentinel-1 SAR 派生产品。文件为年度 NetCDF，包含由 Sentinel-1 SAR 图像对计算的 u/v 海冰速度分量、图像对时间差及相关海冰浓度变量。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides Sentinel-1 SAR-derived Antarctic sea-ice velocity products for 2015-2023. The annual NetCDF files include u/v sea-ice velocity components derived from Sentinel-1 SAR image pairs, time differences between image pairs and related sea-ice concentration variables.
access_status: open direct Zenodo download
openness: CC-BY-4.0
source_type: Zenodo research data deposit with DOI
evidence: Zenodo API lists DOI 10.5281/zenodo.18737893, resource type Dataset, CC-BY-4.0 license and annual files sar_sea_ice_velocity_2015.nc through sar_sea_ice_velocity_2023.nc. Description states Antarctic sea ice velocity derived using Sentinel-1 SAR images and lists u_siv_sar, v_siv_sar and dt_sar variables.
scale: Antarctic annual sea-ice velocity products for 2015-2023
feature_count: 9 annual NetCDF files with SAR-derived sea-ice velocity components
file_size: annual NetCDF files ranging about 24-30 MB each

name: Zenodo Watson Basin Greenland Sentinel-1 SAR Supraglacial Lake Extent GeoTIFF Dataset
provider: 4D-Greenland / ESA Polar+ / Zenodo
theme_canonical: Sentinel-1 SAR supraglacial lake extent GeoTIFF dataset
theme_raw: Supraglacial lakes derived from Sentinel-1 SAR imagery over the Watson basin on the Greenland Ice Sheet
coverage: Watson basin, Greenland Ice Sheet
license: CC-BY-4.0
formats: GeoTIFF raster lake-extent maps
access: Zenodo DOI landing page / direct file download
doi_or_citation: DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.7568049; 4D-Greenland / ESA Polar+ supraglacial lake extent dataset
time_span: May 2017 to September 2019; approximately fortnightly Sentinel-1 SAR-derived products
notes: Accepted in v133 after DOI, URL, title, Watson basin alias, supraglacial lake alias and Zenodo record ID dedup against v132. Related Greenland and Antarctic supraglacial lake rows exist, but this record is a distinct Watson-basin lake-extent GeoTIFF product set.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集提供格陵兰冰盖 Watson basin 的 Sentinel-1 SAR 冰上湖范围分类产品。记录说明数据由 ESA Polar+ 4D-Greenland 项目生成，覆盖 2017 年 5 月至 2019 年 9 月，时间分辨率约为半月，结果以 EPSG:3413 GeoTIFF 栅格发布，并用像元值区分未检出水体、单极化检出水体、双极化检出水体和无数据区域。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides Sentinel-1 SAR-derived supraglacial lake extent classifications over the Watson basin on the Greenland Ice Sheet. The record states that it was produced for the ESA Polar+ 4D-Greenland project, covers May 2017 to September 2019 at approximately fortnightly resolution, and is delivered as EPSG:3413 GeoTIFF rasters with pixel classes for no water, single-polarization water detection, dual-polarization water detection and no data.
access_status: open direct Zenodo download
openness: CC-BY-4.0
source_type: Zenodo research data deposit with DOI
evidence: Zenodo API lists DOI 10.5281/zenodo.7568049, resource type Dataset, CC-BY-4.0 license and many GeoTIFF files named extent_S1B_EW_GRDH_*.tif. Description states supraglacial lake extent derived using Sentinel-1 SAR imagery over Watson basin, May 2017-Sept 2019, approximately fortnightly, EPSG:3413 rasters with pixel class codes.
scale: Watson basin Greenland Ice Sheet, approximately fortnightly products from 2017-05 to 2019-09
feature_count: multiple Sentinel-1 GeoTIFF lake-extent rasters
file_size: individual GeoTIFF files range from about 7.8 MB to 77.4 MB in API sample

name: Zenodo Sentinel-1 Disturbance Map Forest Disturbance Dataset Region 8
provider: Sentinel-1 Disturbance Map authors / USDA IDS / Zenodo
theme_canonical: Sentinel-1 SAR forest disturbance change-detection dataset
theme_raw: Sentinel-1 Disturbance Map
coverage: USDA Forest Service Region 8, southeastern United States
license: CC-BY-4.0
formats: ZIP archive with Sentinel-1 disturbance mapping products
access: Zenodo DOI landing page / direct file download
doi_or_citation: DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.15672487; Sentinel-1 forest disturbance mapping (S1DM) dataset
time_span: historical USDA IDS case study refined with Sentinel-1 SAR observations; record published 2025
notes: Accepted in v133 after DOI, URL, title, S1DM alias, forest disturbance alias and Zenodo record ID dedup against v132. The dataset refines USDA Insect and Disease Survey disturbance information using Sentinel-1 SAR change detection.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集是 Sentinel-1 森林扰动制图（S1DM）案例数据，面向美国东南部 USDA Forest Service Region 8。记录说明数据基于 USDA Insect and Disease Survey，并利用 ESA Sentinel-1 SAR 观测和变化检测算法增强风害、火灾、虫害等森林结构扰动的时空信息。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset is a Sentinel-1 forest disturbance mapping (S1DM) case-study dataset for USDA Forest Service Region 8 in the southeastern United States. The record states that USDA Insect and Disease Survey information was enhanced with ESA Sentinel-1 SAR observations and a change-detection algorithm to improve spatial and temporal information on disturbances such as wind, fire and insect outbreaks.
access_status: open direct Zenodo download
openness: CC-BY-4.0
source_type: Zenodo research data deposit with DOI
evidence: Zenodo API lists DOI 10.5281/zenodo.15672487, resource type Dataset, CC-BY-4.0 license, file radar_enhanced_forest_disturbance_mapping_region_08_buffer_500_s1dm.zip 5,806,122 bytes, and a description stating Sentinel-1 SAR observations and change detection were used to enhance USDA IDS forest disturbance data.
scale: USDA Forest Service Region 8 case study
feature_count: one ZIP archive of radar-enhanced Sentinel-1 forest disturbance mapping products

name: Zenodo Estonia Sentinel-1 Forest Disturbance RADD Mapping Dataset 2020-2023
provider: Open Earth Monitor / Sentinel-1 forest disturbance authors / Zenodo
theme_canonical: Sentinel-1 SAR forest disturbance mapping dataset
theme_raw: Forest disturbances in Europe mapped at high spatial detail and in near-real-time: Logging in protected Estonian forests
coverage: Estonia / European LAEA EPSG:3035 grid
license: CC-BY-4.0
formats: GeoTIFF monthly disturbance rasters, SLD style files and ZIP/record assets
access: Zenodo DOI landing page / direct file download
doi_or_citation: DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.10790859; Open Earth Monitor forest disturbance geostory dataset
time_span: historical Sentinel-1 period 2017-2019 for baseline; disturbance detections 2020-2023
notes: Accepted in v134 after DOI, URL, title, Estonia forest disturbance alias and Zenodo record ID dedup against v133. It is distinct from the v133 USDA Region 8 Sentinel-1 Disturbance Map case study by geography, record DOI and product family.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集提供爱沙尼亚 2020-2023 年森林扰动的 Sentinel-1 SAR 高空间细节近实时制图结果。页面说明方法基于 RADD alerts 思路，使用 2017-2019 年 Sentinel-1 历史影像建立基线，并生成 2020-2023 年扰动检测 GeoTIFF 栅格，服务于受保护森林采伐监测案例。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides high-detail near-real-time Sentinel-1 SAR forest disturbance mapping results for Estonia from 2020 to 2023. The record states that the method is based on the RADD-alerts approach, uses 2017-2019 Sentinel-1 imagery as a historical baseline, and releases disturbance detection GeoTIFF rasters for monitoring logging in protected Estonian forests.
access_status: open direct Zenodo download
openness: CC-BY-4.0
source_type: Zenodo research data deposit with DOI
evidence: Zenodo API lists DOI 10.5281/zenodo.10790859, resource type Dataset, CC-BY-4.0 license, GeoTIFF files such as disturbance_radd_c_10m_s_20220601_20220630_eu_epsg.3035_v20240222.tif and SLD style files. Description states open-source high-resolution Sentinel-1 data were used for wall-to-wall forest disturbance mapping in Estonia over 2020-2023, with 2017-2019 imagery as historical period and RADD-alerts methodology.
scale: wall-to-wall Estonia forest disturbance detections, monthly GeoTIFF products for 2020-2023
feature_count: multiple monthly 10 m disturbance GeoTIFF rasters plus visualization style files
file_size: API sample GeoTIFF files range about 16-23 MB each

name: Zenodo Lakes CCI Arctic Sentinel-1 Lake Water Extent Dataset
provider: ESA Climate Change Initiative / Lakes CCI authors via Zenodo
theme_canonical: Sentinel-1 SAR-derived Arctic and sub-Arctic lake water extent time series
theme_raw: Arctic lakes dataset (Lakes_cci) - Lake water extent of selected arctic lakes based on Sentinel-1 data; Zenodo 20133789
coverage: Selected Arctic and sub-Arctic lakes, mainly northern Europe and high-latitude lake sites listed in the FAIR JSON files
license: CC BY 4.0
formats: FAIR JSON lake water extent records via Zenodo; per-lake JSON files
access: Zenodo landing page and per-lake JSON file downloads
time_span: Not fully enumerated in API; Sentinel-1-derived lake water extent dynamics for selected Arctic/sub-Arctic lakes
notes: Accepted in v135 from a Zenodo source-hop for recent Sentinel-1 hydrology products. The record describes FAIR-compliant lake water extent dynamics derived from Sentinel-1 SAR data and provides 54 per-lake JSON files.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo/Lakes CCI 数据集发布基于 Sentinel-1 SAR 的北极与亚北极湖泊水体范围动态记录。页面说明产品结合深度学习分割、标准化元数据和开放许可，面向水文学、气候和环境监测使用；文件以多个湖泊的 FAIR JSON 形式发布。该条按 Sentinel-1 SAR 湖泊水体范围时间序列产品收录。
desc_en: This Zenodo/Lakes CCI dataset provides lake water extent dynamics for selected Arctic and sub-Arctic lakes derived from Sentinel-1 SAR data. The record describes a FAIR-compliant product combining deep-learning segmentation, standardized metadata and open licensing for hydrology, climate and environmental monitoring. It is cataloged as a Sentinel-1 SAR lake-water-extent time-series product.
access_status: open Zenodo record and per-lake JSON downloads
openness: CC BY 4.0 in Zenodo API metadata
source_type: Zenodo Sentinel-1 SAR Arctic lake water extent dataset
evidence: Zenodo API record 20133789 lists resource type Dataset, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20133789, CC BY 4.0, and 54 files totaling 32.1 MB. The description states that lake water extent dynamics are derived from Sentinel-1 SAR data using deep learning segmentation and FAIR metadata.
access_class: Zenodo landing page and JSON downloads
scale: 54 per-lake FAIR JSON files for selected Arctic/sub-Arctic lake water extent dynamics
feature_count: per-lake lake water extent records; example files include Heimdalsvatn_FAIR.json, Storglomvatn_FAIR.json and Øyern_FAIR.json
file_size: 54 files totaling 32.1 MB according to Zenodo API

name: Zenodo Morobe PNG Sentinel-1 GEDI Tropical Forest Structure Dataset
provider: RMIT University / University of Twente authors via Zenodo
theme_canonical: Sentinel-1 SAR and GEDI-derived tropical forest structure raster predictions
theme_raw: Spatially-aware machine learning predictions of tropical forest structure for Morobe Province, Papua New Guinea; Zenodo 19244885
coverage: Morobe Province, Papua New Guinea
license: CC BY 4.0; CC0 also mentioned for shared materials
formats: GeoTIFF raster predictions and CSV model metrics / feature importance / out-of-fold predictions
access: Zenodo landing page with GeoTIFF and CSV downloads
notes: Accepted in v135 as a multi-source forest-structure product where Sentinel-1 SAR is explicitly listed as a key EO predictor together with Sentinel-2, GEDI, AlphaEarth embeddings, environmental variables and synthetic spatial features.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集发布巴布亚新几内亚 Morobe Province 的热带森林结构空间预测产品。元数据说明 raster 图层由 GEDI 林分结构指标与多源 EO 特征建模生成，其中明确包含 Sentinel-1 SAR、Sentinel-2 光学、AlphaEarth 卫星嵌入、环境变量和空间特征；输出包括冠层高度/覆盖等 GeoTIFF 与模型评价 CSV。该条按 Sentinel-1 参与的森林结构制图数据集收录。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset releases spatial predictions of tropical forest structure for Morobe Province, Papua New Guinea. The metadata states that the raster layers were generated from GEDI-derived forest structure metrics using multi-source EO predictors, explicitly including Sentinel-1 SAR, Sentinel-2 optical data, AlphaEarth satellite embeddings, environmental variables and spatial features. It is cataloged as a Sentinel-1-enabled forest-structure mapping dataset.
access_status: open Zenodo record with GeoTIFF and CSV downloads
openness: CC BY 4.0 in Zenodo API metadata; description also mentions CC0 for shared materials
source_type: Zenodo multi-source EO forest structure dataset with Sentinel-1 SAR predictors
evidence: Zenodo API record 19244885 lists resource type Dataset, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19244885, CC BY 4.0, and 17 files totaling 1.86 GB. The description states that wall-to-wall GEDI-derived forest-structure predictions synergise Sentinel-1 SAR, Sentinel-2 optical, AlphaEarth embeddings, environmental variables and synthetic spatial features.
access_class: Zenodo landing page with GeoTIFF and CSV downloads
scale: wall-to-wall 2020 forest-structure raster predictions for Morobe Province, PNG
feature_count: 17 files including Modelled_RHm/TCC/PAI/FHD GeoTIFFs, FSI_2020.tif, OOF prediction CSVs, metrics and feature-importance tables
file_size: 17 files totaling 1.86 GB according to Zenodo API

name: Zenodo GlacioVision Pakistan Sentinel-1 Multimodal Glacier Dataset
provider: GlacioVision authors via Zenodo
theme_canonical: Sentinel-1/Sentinel-2/GEDI multimodal glacier raster and patch dataset
theme_raw: GlacioVision Dataset; Sentinel-1 VV/VH, Sentinel-2, CAMS EAC4 and GEDI L2A; Zenodo 19305311
coverage: Siachen, Baltoro and Chiantar glaciers, Pakistan
license: CC BY 4.0
formats: ZIP archives containing raw, patch-based and inference-ready multimodal raster data
access: Zenodo landing page and ZIP downloads
notes: Accepted in v135 as a multimodal glacier ML dataset because Sentinel-1 VV/VH SAR bands are a named input in the stacked rasters and patch-based dataset. This is distinct from the existing Baltoro supraglacial-lake product because it covers three Pakistan glaciers and packages raw, patch and inference-ready multimodal data.
desc_zh: GlacioVision 数据集面向巴基斯坦 Siachen、Baltoro 和 Chiantar 三条冰川，发布 2019-2024 年多模态冰川遥感数据。Zenodo 元数据说明数据源包括 Google Earth Engine 中的 Sentinel-1 与 Sentinel-2、CAMS EAC4 气候再分析以及 NASA GEDI L2A，高度对齐后组织为 raw、patch-based 和 inference-ready 三种表示；Sentinel-1 的 VV/VH SAR 波段是堆叠影像输入的一部分。该条按 SAR 参与的多模态冰川机器学习数据集收录。
desc_en: The GlacioVision dataset provides multimodal glacier data for the Siachen, Baltoro and Chiantar glaciers in Pakistan for 2019-2024. Zenodo metadata states that it integrates Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2 imagery from Google Earth Engine, CAMS EAC4 climate reanalysis and NASA GEDI L2A elevation data into raw, patch-based and inference-ready representations; Sentinel-1 VV/VH SAR bands are part of the stacked raster inputs. It is cataloged as a SAR-enabled multimodal glacier machine-learning dataset.
access_status: open Zenodo record and ZIP downloads
openness: CC BY 4.0 in Zenodo API metadata
source_type: Zenodo multimodal glacier dataset with Sentinel-1 SAR bands
evidence: Zenodo API record 19305311 lists resource type Dataset, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19305311, CC BY 4.0, and three ZIP archives totaling 1.63 GB. The description names Sentinel-1/Sentinel-2, CAMS EAC4 and GEDI L2A as inputs and specifies Sentinel-1 VV and VH SAR bands in the final stacked raster.
access_class: Zenodo landing page and ZIP downloads
scale: three Pakistan glaciers, 2019-2024; raw, patch-based and inference-ready representations
feature_count: patches.zip, raw.zip and inference.zip containing multimodal glacier rasters / patches with Sentinel-1 VV/VH among inputs
file_size: 3 files totaling 1.63 GB according to Zenodo API

name: Zenodo Bristol Dry Lake Sentinel-1 MiaplPy MintPy InSAR Time Series Dataset
provider: University of Miami author via Zenodo
theme_canonical: Sentinel-1 InSAR displacement time-series outputs processed with MiaplPy and MintPy
theme_raw: Bristol Dry Lake Sentinel-1 dataset processed with MiaplPy and Mintpy; Zenodo 7388745
coverage: Bristol Dry Lake, California, USA
license: CC BY 4.0
formats: TAR.XZ archive containing Sentinel-1 InSAR time-series outputs
access: Zenodo landing page and TAR.XZ download
doi_or_citation: DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.7388745; concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.7388744
notes: Accepted in v136 as an InSAR time-series output dataset. It complements, but does not duplicate, the existing Mud Creek landslide MiaplPy row because this record covers Bristol Dry Lake and a separate Sentinel-1 track/time-series product.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集发布美国加州 Bristol Dry Lake 的 Sentinel-1 InSAR 位移时间序列结果。元数据说明传感器为 Sentinel-1 descending track 173，时间范围为 2017 年 2 月至 2021 年 1 月，共 157 景，由 ISCE/topsStack 处理，并输出 MiaplPy 与 MintPy 时间序列分析结果。该条按 Sentinel-1 InSAR 时间序列训练/研究数据收录。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides Sentinel-1 InSAR displacement time-series outputs for Bristol Dry Lake, California. The metadata states that it uses Sentinel-1 descending track 173 from February 2017 to January 2021, with 157 acquisitions processed using ISCE/topsStack and analyzed with MiaplPy and MintPy. It is cataloged as a Sentinel-1 InSAR time-series research dataset.
access_status: open Zenodo record and TAR.XZ download
openness: CC BY 4.0 in Zenodo API metadata
source_type: Zenodo Sentinel-1 InSAR time-series dataset
evidence: Zenodo API record 7388745 lists resource type Dataset, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.7388745, CC BY 4.0, and file BristolDryLakeSenDT173.tar.xz. The description states Sentinel-1 descending track 173, 2017.02-2021.01, 157 acquisitions, ISCE/topsStack processing, and MiaplPy/MintPy time-series outputs.
access_class: Zenodo landing page and TAR.XZ download
scale: one Sentinel-1 descending track time series over Bristol Dry Lake, 157 acquisitions
feature_count: one compressed archive of displacement time-series outputs
file_size: BristolDryLakeSenDT173.tar.xz 74.3 MB according to Zenodo API

name: Zenodo Delaware Basin Sentinel-1 InSAR Cumulative Displacement Dataset 2015-2020
provider: University of Miami / JGR study authors via Zenodo
theme_canonical: Sentinel-1 InSAR vertical and east-west cumulative displacement products
theme_raw: InSAR Displacements in the Delaware Basin, TX; Zenodo 5348368
coverage: Delaware Basin, Texas, USA
license: CC BY 4.0
formats: TXT tabular displacement files
access: Zenodo landing page and TXT file downloads
doi_or_citation: DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.5348368; related JGR Solid Earth study Shallow Aseismic Slip in the Delaware Basin Determined by Sentinel-1 InSAR
notes: Accepted in v136 as a Sentinel-1 InSAR cumulative displacement product for induced/aseismic slip research in the Delaware Basin.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集发布美国 Texas Delaware Basin 2015-03-05 至 2020-03-31 的 InSAR 累积位移数据。页面说明数据来自 Sentinel-1 InSAR，用于“Shallow Aseismic Slip in the Delaware Basin Determined by Sentinel-1 InSAR”研究，包含垂向和东西向累积位移文本文件，字段格式为经纬度、投影坐标和位移厘米值。该条按 Sentinel-1 InSAR 地表形变产品收录。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides cumulative InSAR displacements for the Delaware Basin, Texas, from 2015-03-05 to 2020-03-31. The record states that the data were used in a Sentinel-1 InSAR study of shallow aseismic slip and include vertical and east-west cumulative displacement text files with longitude, latitude, projected coordinates and displacement in centimeters. It is cataloged as a Sentinel-1 InSAR surface-deformation product.
access_status: open Zenodo record and TXT downloads
openness: CC BY 4.0 in Zenodo API metadata
source_type: Zenodo Sentinel-1 InSAR displacement dataset
evidence: Zenodo API record 5348368 lists resource type Dataset, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.5348368, CC BY 4.0, and two 61.1 MB TXT files. The description states the data are vertical and east-west cumulative displacements derived from Sentinel-1 InSAR for 2015-03-05 through 2020-03-31.
access_class: Zenodo landing page and TXT downloads
scale: Delaware Basin cumulative displacement products for 2015-2020
feature_count: two tabular displacement files: vertical cumulative InSAR and horizontal cumulative InSAR
file_size: 2 files totaling 122.2 MB according to Zenodo API

name: Zenodo Yazd-Ardakan Envisat Sentinel-1 InSAR Land Subsidence Time-Series Dataset
provider: Mirzadeh et al. via Zenodo
theme_canonical: Envisat and Sentinel-1 InSAR land subsidence time-series products with MintPy outputs
theme_raw: Characterization of Irreversible Land Subsidence in the Yazd-Ardakan Plain, Iran from 2003 to 2020 InSAR Time Series; Zenodo 5138190
coverage: Yazd-Ardakan Plain, Iran
license: CC BY 4.0
formats: ZIP archives including HDF-EOS5 / HDF5 InSAR results, population and weather ancillary data
access: Zenodo landing page and ZIP downloads
doi_or_citation: DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.5138190; related paper DOI 10.1029/2021JB022258
notes: Accepted in v136 as a land-subsidence InSAR time-series archive. It is distinct from the existing nationwide Iran Sentinel-1 subsidence raster row because this record provides study-area time-series datasets and ancillary population/weather data for Yazd-Ardakan.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集发布伊朗 Yazd-Ardakan Plain 2003-2020 年不可逆地面沉降研究所用数据。元数据说明包含 Envisat 与 Sentinel-1 升降轨 InSAR 时间序列，其中 Sentinel-1 覆盖 2014-10 至 2020-03，使用 ISCE/topsStack 与 MintPy，包含 displacement time-series、mean LOS velocity、temporal coherence mask 和 geometry 等 HDF-EOS5/HDF5 产品。该条按 Envisat/Sentinel-1 InSAR 地面沉降时间序列数据集收录。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides the data used to characterize irreversible land subsidence in the Yazd-Ardakan Plain, Iran, from 2003 to 2020. The metadata states that it includes Envisat and Sentinel-1 ascending/descending InSAR time-series datasets; the Sentinel-1 component spans October 2014 to March 2020 and was processed with ISCE/topsStack and MintPy, including displacement time series, mean LOS velocity, temporal-coherence masks and geometry products. It is cataloged as an Envisat/Sentinel-1 InSAR land-subsidence time-series archive.
access_status: open Zenodo record and ZIP downloads
openness: CC BY 4.0 in Zenodo API metadata
source_type: Zenodo Envisat and Sentinel-1 InSAR land subsidence time-series dataset
evidence: Zenodo API record 5138190 lists resource type Dataset, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.5138190, CC BY 4.0, and InSAR_Results.zip. The description enumerates Envisat and Sentinel-1 ascending/descending datasets, Sentinel-1 acquisition counts and dates, ISCE/topsStack + MintPy processing, and HDF-EOS5/HDF5 products.
access_class: Zenodo landing page and ZIP downloads
scale: Yazd-Ardakan Plain InSAR time-series archive with Envisat and Sentinel-1 tracks
feature_count: InSAR_Results.zip plus Population.zip and Weather.zip; Sentinel-1 and Envisat time-series, velocity, temporal coherence and geometry products
file_size: 3 files totaling 8.39 GB according to Zenodo API

name: Zenodo Japan 15-Year ALOS Sentinel-1 LiCSBAS Urban Ground Deformation Dataset
provider: AIST author via Zenodo
theme_canonical: ALOS and Sentinel-1 LiCSBAS nationwide Japan urban ground deformation products
theme_raw: Dataset and figures for Nationwide urban ground deformation in Japan for 15 years detected by ALOS, Sentinel-1, and LiCSBAS; Zenodo 8163883
coverage: Urban and populated regions across Japan
license: CC BY 4.0
formats: ZIP archives of LiCSBAS results and figures, including LOS velocities, decomposed vertical / east-west velocities, optical images, small-baseline network and masks
access: Zenodo landing page and ZIP downloads
doi_or_citation: DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.8163883; concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.8163882
time_span: 15-year ALOS and Sentinel-1 deformation study period; Sentinel-1 component follows modern LiCSBAS processing
notes: Accepted in v136 as a separate 15-year ALOS/Sentinel-1 LiCSBAS dataset. It is distinct from the existing 2020 Sentinel-1-only nationwide Japan LiCSAR/LiCSBAS row because this later record explicitly combines ALOS and Sentinel-1 and packages 69 cumulative-filter result archives for a 15-year study.
desc_zh: 该 Zenodo 数据集发布“Nationwide urban ground deformation in Japan for 15 years detected by ALOS, Sentinel-1, and LiCSBAS”研究所用数据和图件。元数据说明数据包含 LiCSBAS 结果，包括 LOS 速度、分解后的垂向和东西向速度、光学影像、small-baseline network 和 mask；文件以多个日本城市/区域的 cumulative-filter ZIP 包发布。该条按 ALOS/Sentinel-1 InSAR 全国城市地表形变产品收录。
desc_en: This Zenodo dataset provides data and figures for the study “Nationwide urban ground deformation in Japan for 15 years detected by ALOS, Sentinel-1, and LiCSBAS.” The metadata states that it contains LiCSBAS results including LOS velocities, decomposed vertical and east-west velocities, optical images, small-baseline networks and masks, packaged as multiple cumulative-filter ZIP archives for Japanese urban regions. It is cataloged as an ALOS/Sentinel-1 InSAR nationwide urban ground-deformation dataset.
access_status: open Zenodo record and ZIP downloads
openness: CC BY 4.0 in Zenodo API metadata
source_type: Zenodo ALOS and Sentinel-1 LiCSBAS ground deformation dataset
evidence: Zenodo API record 8163883 lists resource type Dataset, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.8163883, CC BY 4.0, 69 files totaling 12.97 GB, and a description of LiCSBAS results from ALOS, Sentinel-1 and LiCSBAS including LOS velocities, decomposed vertical/EW velocities, optical images, SB network and mask.

desc_zh: Copernicus DEM 是由 TanDEM-X 任务数据和编辑后的 WorldDEM DSM 派生的数字表面模型，表示包括建筑、基础设施和植被在内的地表顶部反射面。Copernicus Data Space 将其作为 COP-DEM 集合发布，包含 EEA-10、GLO-30 和 GLO-90 等实例，其中 30 m 和 90 m 产品可通过注册/公共开放数据入口访问。AWS Open Data Registry 还提供 GLO-30 Public 和 GLO-90 的 Cloud Optimized GeoTIFF 分发，因此该条作为独立的 TanDEM-X 派生 Copernicus DSM 产品收录。
desc_en: Copernicus DEM is a digital surface model derived from TanDEM-X mission data and the edited WorldDEM DSM, representing the top reflective surface of the Earth including buildings, infrastructure and vegetation. Copernicus Data Space publishes it as the COP-DEM collection with EEA-10, GLO-30 and GLO-90 instances, while the 30 m and 90 m products are available through registered/public access routes. AWS Open Data Registry also distributes GLO-30 Public and GLO-90 as Cloud Optimized GeoTIFFs, so this row catalogs it as a distinct Copernicus-distributed TanDEM-X-derived DSM product.
access_status: open landing page; GLO-30/GLO-90 freely accessible through registered Copernicus access and public AWS Open Data buckets; EEA-10 restricted
openness: Copernicus Data Space public metadata and public AWS Open Data distribution for GLO-30 Public/GLO-90
source_type: Copernicus / TanDEM-X WorldDEM-derived digital surface model product
evidence: Copernicus Data Space states that COP-DEM is a Digital Surface Model with EEA-10, GLO-30 and GLO-90 instances, that data were acquired by the TanDEM-X mission between 2011 and 2015, and that the DEM is derived from an edited DSM named WorldDEM. AWS Registry states that Copernicus DEM GLO-30 Public and GLO-90 are distributed as Cloud Optimized GeoTIFFs from the 2021 release and are available free for the general public under license terms.
access_class: Copernicus Data Space / AWS Open Data / public S3 COG access
scale: global 30 m and 90 m DSM product instances, plus restricted European 10 m instance
feature_count: global tiled DSM collection; AWS bucket listing exposes tile-level COG objects
file_size: tiled global COG distribution; total size varies by instance and tile set

desc_en: This PANGAEA dataset provides InSAR digital elevation models and line-of-sight displacement products for permafrost subsidence studies in the Alaska North Slope and Mackenzie River Delta. The landing page states that multiple interferograms from ERS-1/2, ENVISAT, ALOS and TerraSAR-X were used, and that ASAR/TerraSAR-X InSAR DEM GeoTIFF links are provided. It is part of the ESA DUE Permafrost local services data family.

It supports glacier mass-balance and elevation-change studies in the Peruvian Andes.

desc_zh: FUSAR-Ship 是复旦大学电磁波信息科学教育部重点实验室发布的高分三号 GF-3 SAR-AIS 船舶与海上目标识别数据集。机构页说明其由 100 多景 GF-3 场景构建，包含 512×512 TIFF 图像切片、AIS 匹配元数据以及船舶和非船海上干扰目标；Journal of Radars 页面进一步给出 16,144 个图像切片、15 个船舶大类和 98 个子类等信息。数据页提供 Baidu Cloud、Google Drive 和期刊注册下载入口，适合 SAR 船舶检测、识别和 SAR-AIS 匹配研究。
desc_en: FUSAR-Ship is a Gaofen-3 SAR-AIS ship and maritime target recognition dataset released by Fudan University. The institutional page describes 512 x 512 TIFF chips with AIS matchup metadata built from more than 100 GF-3 scenes, while the Journal of Radars page reports 16,144 image slices, 15 ship categories and 98 subcategories plus non-ship maritime targets. The dataset has Baidu Cloud, Google Drive and Journal of Radars registration-download access points for SAR ship detection, recognition and SAR-AIS matchup research.

openness: public academic dataset with registration or third-party-drive download; non-commercial/commercial-permission terms on Journal of Radars mirror

Journal of Radars FUSAR page states 16,144 image slices from 126 GF-3 scenes, 6,252 ship chips with AIS, 15 ship categories, 98 subcategories, non-ship targets and registration download.

desc_en: AIR-SARShip-2.0 is a high-resolution SAR ship object detection dataset released through Journal of Radars. The data page states that it contains 300 single-polarization SAR images at 1 m and 3 m resolution, with spotlight and strip imaging modes over ports, islands, reefs and varying sea states, covering more than ten vessel categories such as transport ships, oil tankers and fishing boats. Each image is about 1000 x 1000 pixels in single-channel 16-bit TIFF format with annotation files for vessel size, category and position.

It provides JPG three-channel gray slices with XML annotations and also includes large-scene SAR images with annotated aircraft, oil tanks, bridges, ships and airport runways.

desc_en: SARMV3D-3.0 is a SAR microwave-vision 3D imaging research dataset released through Journal of Radars. The page describes three subsets: UAV-borne full-polarization array-InSAR building data, electromagnetic scattering data for typical scattering mechanisms, and airborne 14-channel array-InSAR data for targets such as cars, ships and oil tanks. The first subset also includes contemporaneous laser point-cloud and oblique optical photography data, and the main SARMV3D-Imaging-3.0.zip package is listed as about 60.91 GB.

It provides MAT files, thumbnails, dataset-description spreadsheets, interference-suppression results and a usage-instruction PDF for SAR interference characterization, detection, suppression and downstream analysis under interference.

desc_zh: 该 CEDA/COMET 数据集提供 Alpine-Himalayan Belt 的跨大陆 Sentinel-1 InSAR 与 GNSS 形变、应变和速度产品。页面说明其使用 2016-2024 年 Sentinel-1 雷达影像，结合超过 222,000 景 Sentinel-1 SAR 图像和 GNSS 速度场，在统一 Eurasian reference frame 下生成 1 km 空间分辨率的平均表面速度和时间序列，覆盖从欧洲西南部到中国东部超过 11,000 km、超过 2,000 万平方公里区域。数据为 ZIP，包含 TIFF、PNG、text 和 KMZ 文件。
desc_en: This CEDA/COMET dataset provides transcontinental Sentinel-1 InSAR and GNSS deformation, strain and velocity products for the Alpine-Himalayan Belt. The landing page states that Sentinel-1 radar images from 2016-2024, including more than 222,000 Sentinel-1 SAR images combined with GNSS velocities in a consistent Eurasian reference frame, were used to produce 1 km surface velocities and time series across more than 11,000 km from south-western Europe to eastern China and more than 20 million square kilometers. Data are distributed as ZIP files containing TIFF, PNG, text and KMZ files.

Access includes historical and latest GeoJSON indexes, WCS/WMS services, an interactive map and original metadata for river-ice and spring flood risk monitoring.

desc_en: ABoVE AirSWOT Ka-band Radar over Surface Waters of Alaska and Canada, 2017 is an ORNL DAAC airborne Ka-band radar dataset for rivers, lakes, ponds and wetlands across the ABoVE domain. The CMR record describes elevation, incidence angle, magnitude/backscatter, interferometric correlation, DHDPHI and height-error products at about 3.6 square meter resolution, delivered both in original UTM coordinates and as ABoVE-grid clipped products. This row is included as radar remote sensing and kept distinct from the existing AirSWOT orthomosaic/water-mask derivative product.

desc_en: Shuttle Imaging Radar-A Earth Surface Imagery is the NASA SIR-A L-band radar image collection acquired during the STS-2 Space Shuttle mission in November 1981. This row fills the early shuttle radar archive but marks access as historic/NSSDC-mediated rather than direct modern download.

Service metadata documents RADARSAT-2 in earlier years and RCM in recent years; v190 further verified the open GeoTIFF ZIP directory tree, 2024/2023 per-province ZIP examples, the 2024 ImageServer, crop classification CSV and product specification PDF.

desc_en: This dataset uses RADARSAT Constellation Mission (RCM) SAR imagery to identify open-water regions within ice-covered rivers during winter for hydrokinetic resource assessment near off-grid diesel-reliant communities. The data are processed with the HyRASS machine-learning SAR image processing and classification algorithm and distributed through FGDB/GDB, SHP ZIP and Geo.ca MapServer resources.

Product granules are discoverable through ASF/Earthdata Search and a public product specification PDF is available.

desc_en: This dataset provides the 1997 peak overland flood boundary for Manitoba’s Red River Valley. Open Canada metadata states that it is based on RADARSAT-1 satellite imagery, resampled to 12.5 m pixels and classified with PCI Geomatica, with the final flood boundary available as TIFF or Shapefile and current Manitoba GeoPortal resources exposing CSV, GeoJSON, GeoPackage, KML, Shapefile, FileGDB and ArcGIS service access. It is kept separate from the 2009 and 2011 Red River Flood products by event year and independent portal IDs.

desc_en: This Parks Canada / Open Canada dataset provides remote-sensing water-extent monitoring for the Peace-Athabasca Delta in Wood Buffalo National Park. Open Canada metadata states that optical and RADARSAT radar satellite imagery, together with ground truthing, are used each spring to map surface-water extent and associated vegetation; resources include a 1996-2015 CSV data table and data dictionary. It is cataloged as a RADARSAT-assisted wetland hydrology and inundation product distinct from ABoVE UAVSAR Peace-Athabasca products.
